name: Elfnotes: Welcome Home
name_jp: エルフェンノーツ～<ruby lang="jp"><rb>廻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>郷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のパラレリズム～
desc: The monster in your center Main Monster Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects. You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Elfnote" monster with a different original Attribute from your Deck in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Elfnotes: Welcome Home" once per turn.
eff: The monster in your center Main Monster Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects. You can send 1 monster from your hand or field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Elfnote" monster with a different original Attribute from your Deck in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Elfnotes: Welcome Home" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
